name: PELIZAEUS-MERZBACHER DISEASE
definition: rare X-linked sudanophilic leukodystrophy (5 types with different times of onset, rate of
distribution: mild / moderate prominence of cortical sulci
discriminating_features: lack of myelination (appearance of newborn brain retained)
hyperintense internal capsule, optic radiations, proximal corona radiata on T1WI
near complete absence of hypointensity in supratentorial region on T2WI

MR: lack of myelination (appearance of newborn brain retained)
hyperintense internal capsule, optic radiations, proximal corona radiata on T1WI
near complete absence of hypointensity in supratentorial region on T2WI
mild / moderate prominence of cortical sulci
